steps.reason: To proceed with moving the file sunset.jpg, I need to select the "Move to…" option from the context menu. This action will open the directory selection interface, allowing me to choose the destination folder (Pictures) within the same storage area. The "Move to…" option is clearly visible as UI element 4, so I will click on it to continue the file-moving process.
